name: Dell Scholars Program
amount: $20,000 over 6 years plus laptop, textbook credits, and support resources

eligibility.other_requirements: Must have overcome significant obstacles; Pell Grant eligible; participating in college readiness program (e.g., AVID, Upward Bound, GEAR UP); must enroll in a degree-granting institution

stackable_notes: Stackable with most institutional aid. Includes non-monetary support (laptop, textbook credits, personal success coaching) that has real value beyond the cash award. Verify displacement risk at specific institutions.
notes: Unusually holistic for a large program — prioritizes students who have overcome systemic barriers over pure academic achievement (minimum 2.4 GPA). The $20,000 is distributed over up to 6 years, supporting students who need extra time. Bundled support services (coaching, emergency funds) meaningfully improve graduation rates for scholars.
